metadata.title:
AMONG THE TOHERJ
The Fight Against the Tobacco Trust Has


Reached Spokane.

pages.raw_text:
The Blue Label league, which is
the fact that they are doing all in
their power to crush out the Cigar
makers International union, will have
a strong ally in the Cigarmakers'
union of Spokane.


At the meeting of the State Fed
Grafton of Labor at Seattle last week
the Pacific Coast Blue Label league
was organized and it is the intention
of the members, which will soon in
clude nearly every union cigarmaker
of British Columbia, Washington
and Oregon, to wage a war of eX
termination against trust goods in
the lines of tobacco and cigars.


I'VE have done nothing yet" said
the president of Spokane Cigarmak-
ers' union. but we shall take action,
probably at our next meeting, and we
will have the support of every labor
union in the city"


The State Federation of Labor en-
dorsed the movement in a resolution
which was unanimously adopted.


The tobacco trust is trying to
crush out the life of the Cigarmakers
union said Il member of that body
yesterday. "and we don't propose to
submit In the first place. n boy
colt will be placed on every class Of
cigar and every class of tobacco that
does not bear the union blue label
We have the dealers between us.
They can buy the trust goods cheap
er than the union made goods for
the reason that much OF them are put
up by children and Incompetent labor
of cheap sort. Therefore dealers
do not want to refuse to handle trust
goods. Now the time has come when
the cigar and tobacco dealer must de-
clare himself one way or the other
He must either be willing to drop
the trust goods until they bear the
union label or he must stand union
boycott There will be no stop after
we once get started until all trust
goods bear the union label"
